title: claytonia arenicola
intro: Claytonia arenicola, also known as beach springbeauty, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting immune function. Claytonia arenicola can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
